acceptance_targets: [CH04-F006] PASS only if, within those cited spans, at most one 'Somebody had...' sentence remains and at most one 'It was X. It was Y.' antithesis pair remains; FAIL if both constructions still recur three or more times across the chapter-level beats in those lines.

[CH04-F007] PASS only if the revised span includes at least three distinct Lena interior moments (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) distributed across the run and each one directly precedes or motivates a visible action; FAIL if the sequence remains purely external reportage.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if, within those cited spans, at most one 'Somebody had...' sentence remains and at most one 'It was X. It was Y.' antithesis pair remains; FAIL if both constructions still recur three or more times across the chapter-level beats in those lines.
findings.problem: Recurring sentence templates have become tics: repeated anonymous 'Somebody had...' attribution and repeated antithetical 'It was X. It was Y.' constructions flatten rhythm and telegraph authorial autopilot.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary sentence architecture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:129, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:217, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:261, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:269 by replacing repeated templates with concrete agents, mixed clause lengths, and at least one non-antithetical transition.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised span includes at least three distinct Lena interior moments (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) distributed across the run and each one directly precedes or motivates a visible action; FAIL if the sequence remains purely external reportage.
findings.problem: Interiority drop: the logistics run from Whitaker approach through dispatch phone ring plays as external blocking/dialogue for more than ten consecutive paragraphs, pushing the chapter toward screenplay mode.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add close-third interior beats for Lena across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:181-215 (early, middle, and late in the sequence) so perception, judgment, or memory actively shapes her tactical choices.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
